title: Algerian Fish Tagine
description: A traditional Algerian dish made with flaky fish, tangy spices, and a flavorful tagine sauce.

ingredients.name: Flaky Fish Fillets
ingredients.notes: Any white fish works well, such as cod or tilapia

instructions: Heat oil in a large tagine or Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Add fish fillets and cook until browned on both sides, about 3-4 minutes per side.
Add spice blends, salt, and pepper. Stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 5-7 minutes, or until fish is cooked through.
Garnish with parsley and serve hot.
